content.text:
そうなんだ！Archにしたんだね。

いい選択だと思うよ。Archはシンプルで、自分が何を入れてるか全部把握できるのがいいところ。Wikiも最強だし。

Nixは確かに面白い仕組みだけど、学習コストが高いし、独自の世界観に慣れるまで大変だよね。Archなら困ったときの情報も多いし、実用的。

Archで何か困ったことあったら聞いてね！

en.content:
Oh really! So you went with Arch.

I think that's a good choice. Arch is nice because it's simple and you can understand everything you've installed. The Wiki is unbeatable too.

Nix is definitely an interesting system, but the learning curve is steep and it takes a while to get used to its unique world. With Arch, there's plenty of info when you run into trouble, and it's practical.

Let me know if you have any trouble with Arch!
